properties.displayName: UAV S7 - Weapon Two-Person Rule Violation
properties.description: UAV 무장 2-person 룰 위반 탐지. [A] 2-person 룰 위반(fire_rejected/two_person_rule_violation) [B] 안전 미해제 상태 발사 시도(target_mismatch_or_unlocked) [C] 비인가 무장 해제(safety_set ARMED by unknown operator). UAVWeapon_CL 기반. MITRE ICS ATT&CK: T0835·T0816
properties.query:
let ApprovedOperators = dynamic(["sgt.yang", "lt.kim", "capt.park", "maj.cho", "col.lee"]);
let lookback = 1h;
// [블록 A] 2-person 룰 위반
let TwoPersonViolation =
    UAVWeapon_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "fire_rejected"
    | where FailReason == "two_person_rule_violation"
    | extend TriggerReason = "TwoPerson_Rule_Violation"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "Operator:", Operator,
        "|WeaponId:", WeaponId,
        "|TargetId:", TargetId
    )
    | project TimeGenerated, WeaponId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, Operator;
// [블록 B] 안전 미해제 발사 시도
let UnsafeFireAttempt =
    UAVWeapon_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "fire_rejected"
    | where FailReason == "target_mismatch_or_unlocked"
    | extend TriggerReason = "Fire_Without_Unlock"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "Operator:", Operator,
        "|WeaponId:", WeaponId,
        "|TargetId:", TargetId
    )
    | project TimeGenerated, WeaponId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, Operator;
// [블록 C] 비인가 운영자 무장 시도
let UnauthorizedArm =
    UAVWeapon_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "safety_set"
    | where SafetyState == "ARMED"
    | where Operator !in (ApprovedOperators)
    | extend TriggerReason = "Unauthorized_Weapon_Arm"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "Operator:", Operator,
        "|WeaponId:", WeaponId,
        "|SafetyStateBefore:", SafetyStateBefore
    )
    | project TimeGenerated, WeaponId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, Operator;
TwoPersonViolation
| union UnsafeFireAttempt
| union UnauthorizedArm
| extend UAVId = WeaponId
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
